prestazioni: Engine: Twin-turbocharged 5.9L V12 (M275 E50 AL) with forged internals by Mahle (pistons, connecting rods) and billet crankshaft by Manley, supporting 850+ HP at 1.5 bar boost on 100-octane fuel with a custom ECU remap by AEM Infinity 10 (CAN-bus integration for Maybach-specific sensors).

Forced Induction: Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (88mm compressor wheels, 1.25 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and custom 4-inch stainless steel intercooler piping by Vibrant Performance, paired with a PWR 1500hp-rated bar-and-plate intercooler (core dimensions: 32" x 12" x 4.5").

Drivetrain: Reinforced 6-speed automatic transmission (W5A580) with a Level 10 torque converter (stall speed: 4,200 RPM) and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lockup), mated to a custom driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" 4340 chromoly, balanced to 10,000 RPM). Suspension overhauled with KW Variant 5 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 12-position rebound, 16-level compression) and spherical bearing control arms by 034 Motorsport (polyurethane bushings replaced with Aurora Racing bearings).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber widebody kit by Wald International (Exelero-specific, 3-piece front splitter with integrated canards, side skirts with air curtains, and a 2-stage active rear wing with Gurney flap), reducing drag coefficient to 0.32 while generating 180kg of downforce at 250 km/h.

Wheels & Tires: Custom 22" x 11.5" (front) and 22" x 13" (rear) forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF16 flow-formed, 3-piece construction, 5x130 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/25 R22 front, 335/25 R22 rear) with nitrogen inflation (32 PSI hot).

Exterior Finishes: Full 3-stage paint correction by Mirror Image Detailing (PPF on high-impact zones) with a custom matte-finish "Liquid Black" wrap by 3M (2080 series, satin finish) and exposed carbon fiber accents (hood, roof, mirror caps) by Carbon Revolution (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave). Interior retrimmed with Alcantara suede (Rosso Corsa stitching) by Katzkin, featuring a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in) and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Schroth 6-point harnesses).
